signature: create_box(origin: list, sizes: list, name: str = None, material: str = None, **kwargs)
docstring: Create a box.
constraints_json: ["origin and sizes use the active model units unless explicit unit strings are provided", "sizes must be positive in all three dimensions", "conductors and dielectrics should receive explicit material assignments"]
common_errors_json: ["negative or zero size creates invalid geometry", "wrong active units cause models scaled by 1000x", "missing material leaves default material instead of intended dielectric or conductor"]

signature: assign_material(assignment: str | list, material: str)
docstring: Assign a material to one or more objects.

signature: create_rectangle(orientation: 'str | int | Plane', origin: list | object, sizes: list, name: str = None, material: str = None, is_covered: bool = True, **kwargs)
docstring: Create a rectangle.
constraints_json: ["orientation determines the sheet plane and must match the intended conductor plane", "sizes must be positive", "sheet conductors used as ground or trace need explicit conductor material or boundary"]
common_errors_json: ["rectangle created on the wrong plane", "trace or ground left without copper/PEC behavior", "position interpreted in wrong model units"]

signature: wave_port(assignment: int | Object3d | FacePrimitive, reference: int | str | list | Object3d = None, create_port_sheet: bool | None = False, create_pec_cap: bool | None = False, integration_line: int | Gravity | None = 0, port_on_plane: bool | None = True, modes: int | None = 1, impedance: float | None = 50, name: str | None = None, renormalize: bool | None = True, deembed: float | None = 0, is_microstrip: bool | None = False, vfactor: int | None = 3, hfactor: int | None = 5, terminals_rename: bool | None = True, characteristic_impedance: str | list | None = 'Zpi')
docstring: Create a waveport from a sheet (``start_object``) or taking the closest edges of two objects.
constraints_json: ["assignment should be an exterior terminal face or sheet reaching the background", "buried microstrip ports usually need lumped ports instead", "integration line must be valid for the selected face"]
common_errors_json: ["selected face does not touch background", "wrong terminal face selected", "integration_line format rejected by PyAEDT"]
source_refs_json: ["pyaedt source hfss.py", "local Stage B wave port smoke"]

signature: lumped_port(assignment: str | int | list, reference: Object3d | int | list | None = None, create_port_sheet: bool = False, port_on_plane: bool = True, integration_line: int | Gravity | list[float] = 0, impedance: float | int = 50, name: str | None = None, renormalize: bool = True, deembed: bool = False, terminals_rename: bool = True, auto_identify: bool = False)
docstring: Create a waveport taking the closest edges of two objects.
constraints_json: ["assignment must be an existing sheet, face, or valid object depending on create_port_sheet", "integration line must cross signal to reference direction", "microstrip lumped port sheet should span trace width and reach reference conductor"]
common_errors_json: ["port sheet does not touch the trace/reference geometry", "integration line is reversed or malformed", "using wave port for a buried microstrip feed that should be lumped"]
source_refs_json: ["pyaedt source hfss.py", "local microstrip demo repair log"]

signature: create_setup(name: str = 'MySetupAuto', setup_type: str | None = None, **kwargs)
docstring: Create an analysis setup for HFSS.
constraints_json: ["setup frequency should be explicit and unit-qualified", "at least one valid excitation is normally required before analyze", "optimization target may differ from setup frequency and must be tracked separately"]
common_errors_json: ["invalid frequency string", "setup created before ports exist", "using setup frequency as tuning target when user requested a different resonance target"]

signature: create_region(pad_value: float | str | list[float | str | int] = 300, pad_type: str = 'Percentage Offset', name: str = 'Region', **kwarg)
docstring: Create an air region.

signature: create_open_region(frequency: int | float | str | None = '1GHz', boundary: str | None = 'Radiation', apply_infinite_ground: bool | None = False, gp_axis: str | None = '-z')
docstring: Create an open region on the active editor.

signature: assign_radiation_boundary_to_objects(assignment: str | list | Object3d, name: str | None = None)
docstring: Assign a radiation boundary to one or more objects (usually airbox objects).
constraints_json: ["assignment should be the airbox/open-region object, not the radiator or substrate", "airbox padding should be frequency-aware, commonly at least about quarter wavelength for antenna demos"]
common_errors_json: ["radiation assigned to wrong object", "airbox missing or too small", "assignment object not found"]
source_refs_json: ["pyaedt source hfss.py", "local radiation airbox smoke", "local dipole tuning demo"]

signature: assign_perfecte_to_sheets(assignment: str | list, name: str | None = None, is_infinite_ground: bool | None = False)
docstring: Create a Perfect E taking one sheet.

signature: get_object_faces(assignment: int | str)
docstring: Retrieve the face IDs of a given object ID or object name.

signature: get_face_center(assignment: int)
docstring: Retrieve the center position for a given planar face ID.

signature: get_faceid_from_position(position: list, assignment: str = None, units: str = None)
docstring: Retrieve a face ID from a position.

signature: insert_3d_component(input_file: str | Path, geometry_parameters: dict = None, material_parameters: str = '', design_parameters: str = '', coordinate_system: str = 'Global', name: str = None, password = None, auxiliary_parameters: bool = False)
docstring: Insert a new 3D component.

signature: unite(assignment: list, purge: bool = False, keep_originals: bool = False)
docstring: Unite objects from a list.

signature: create_frequency_sweep(unit: str = None, start_frequency: float = 1.0, stop_frequency: float = 10.0, num_of_freq_points: int = None, name: str = None, save_fields: bool = True, save_rad_fields: bool = False, sweep_type: str = 'Discrete', interpolation_tol: float = 0.5, interpolation_max_solutions: int = 250)
docstring: Create a sweep with the specified number of points.

signature: create_linear_count_sweep(setup: str, unit: str, start_frequency: float, stop_frequency: float, num_of_freq_points: int | None = None, name: str | None = None, save_fields: bool = True, save_rad_fields: bool = False, sweep_type: str = 'Discrete', interpolation_tol: float = 0.5, interpolation_max_solutions: int = 250)
docstring: Create a sweep with a specified number of points.

signature: create_linear_count_sweep(setup: str, unit: str, start_frequency: float, stop_frequency: float, num_of_freq_points: int | None = None, name: str | None = None, save_fields: bool = True, save_rad_fields: bool = False, sweep_type: str = 'Discrete', interpolation_tol: float = 0.5, interpolation_max_solutions: int = 250)
params_json: [{"name": "setup", "type": "str", "required": true}, {"name": "unit", "type": "str", "required": true}, {"name": "start_frequency", "type": "float", "required": true}, {"name": "stop_frequency", "type": "float", "required": true}, {"name": "num_of_freq_points", "type": "int", "required": false}, {"name": "sweep_type", "type": "str", "required": false}]
docstring: Create a sweep with a specified number of points.
constraints_json: ["start_frequency must be lower than stop_frequency", "target resonance or report frequency must lie inside the sweep range", "sweep_type must be one of Fast, Interpolating, or Discrete for controlled workflows"]
common_errors_json: ["target frequency outside sweep", "wrong unit argument name for PyAEDT version", "too few points for result-level validation"]
source_refs_json: ["pyaedt source hfss.py", "local Stage C planner repair"]

docstring: Export a Touchstone file.

signature: ToggleViaPin(["NAME:elements", "<component>-<pin>"])
docstring: Recorded AEDT editor command that turns a selected via/pin into a 3D Layout excitation.
constraints_json: ["element name uses component-pin form such as J30-A5", "after creation set the excitation HFSS Type to Gap for vertical circuit-port behavior observed in AEDT UI", "port name is commonly component.pin.net and should be discovered from the new port list when possible"]
common_errors_json: ["component-pin string does not match an existing layout pin", "created excitation remains wrong HFSS Type", "edge-port API used for a pin where ToggleViaPin is required"]
source_refs_json: ["local recorded AEDT script tmp/pin_port.py", "local BRD demo manual validation"]

signature: Edb(edbpath=None, cellname=None, isreadonly=False, edbversion=None)
docstring: Open or create an EDB database used for BRD/MCM import and cutout workflows.
constraints_json: ["Cadence BRD import requires a working Cadence/extracta environment", "close/save EDB explicitly before opening in HFSS 3D Layout"]
common_errors_json: ["missing Cadence environment", "EDB left open and locked"]

signature: get_components_from_nets(nets)
docstring: Return components connected to selected nets for endpoint discovery.
constraints_json: ["net names must be resolved against the actual board net inventory first", "wildcards should be converted to exact net names before component lookup"]
common_errors_json: ["empty result from mistyped net", "differential pair endpoint hidden by unmatched wildcard"]

signature: get_component_net_connection_info(component_name)
docstring: Return component pin/net connection details used to score port endpoints.
constraints_json: ["component name must exist in EDB", "pin/net records should be filtered by selected signal and reference nets"]

signature: get_pin_position(component_name, pin_name)
docstring: Return physical pin position for layout port endpoint scoring.
constraints_json: ["pin must belong to the component", "position units must be normalized before distance scoring"]
common_errors_json: ["pin not found", "unit mismatch in endpoint distance"]

signature: ImportStackupXML(stackup_xml)
docstring: Import stackup XML into an opened HFSS 3D Layout project.
constraints_json: ["HFSS 3D Layout project should be opened from the cutout EDB before stackup import", "stackup XML must match layer names expected by the board"]
common_errors_json: ["XML imported into wrong design state", "layer names differ from board stackup"]

signature: create_differential_port(via_signal, via_reference, port_name=None, deembed=False)
docstring: Create differential layout ports where the wrapped PyAEDT API applies.
constraints_json: ["only use when the selected endpoint geometry matches the API expectation", "for connector pins validated through AEDT UI, ToggleViaPin plus HFSS Type Gap is preferred"]
common_errors_json: ["wrong endpoint type", "port generated but solver rejects pin terminal"]
